Click "Next" to review your purchase details and confirm the billing impact. Check the confirmation box before continuing. Check the confirmation box before continuing. Click "Confirm & purchase" to complete the transaction. Click "Confirm & purchase" to complete the transaction. Note: You can also purchase seats while adding a new member. If you don't have an available seat of the selected type, you'll be prompted to purchase one. Reducing your seat allocation You can reduce the total number of seats on your Team plan: Log in with your Owner or Primary Owner account. Log in with your Owner or Primary Owner account. Navigate to Organization settings > Organization . Navigate to Organization settings > Organization . If needed, remove members or reassign them to free up the seats you want to eliminate. If needed, remove members or reassign them to free up the seats you want to eliminate. Click “Manage” under Total seats . Click “Manage” under Total seats . Click “Add or change seats” in the Seat breakdown modal. Click “Add or change seats” in the Seat breakdown modal. Click the " - " next to the seat type you want to reduce. Click the " - " next to the seat type you want to reduce. Click “Next” to review the changes. Click “Next” to review the changes. Check the confirmation box and click "Confirm & purchase" to complete the change. Check the confirmation box and click "Confirm & purchase" to complete the change. Assigning and reassigning seat types You can move users between Standard and Premium seats within your existing allocation. To reassign a user's seat type: Go to Organization settings > Organization . Go to Organization settings > Organization . Find the member you want to reassign. Find the member you want to reassign. Click the dropdown under Seat Tier . Click the dropdown under Seat Tier . Select Standard or Premium. Select Standard or Premium. Members moved from Premium to Standard will have lower usage limits, and vice versa. Upgrading a Standard seat to Premium Upgrading a member from Standard to Premium is a reassignment, not a new purchase. You don't need to buy an additional seat unless your Premium allocation is already full. 1. Go to Organization settings
